description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist black-and-white color scheme. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, large windows, and two palm trees planted in square cutouts in the driveway. The property includes a driveway with parking spaces, a small swimming pool with a sun umbrella, and several trees and shrubs around the perimeter. The rear of the house has a rooftop terrace with railings and a secondary building or garage structure adjacent to the main house. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The overall layout is open and geometric, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a driveway with palm trees and a pool. The design is minimalist and geometric, with black-and-white exteriors and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway with two palm trees, and a car parked in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, palm trees, and the car, with the main house and rooftop terrace visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secondary building, pool area, and rooftop terrace, with trees lining the property.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing the pool, sun umbrella, secondary building, and landscaped trees, with the main house in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, columns, and large glass doors, flanked by palm trees and a paved driveway.
